3005420.name: Mazer
3005420.description:
MAZER is an arcade score chasing infinite runner that can be played by 1 to 10 players. Race through procedurally generated mazes at an increasingly fast pace and achieve the highest score possible. Post your scores in local, and online leaderboards, and unlock in game stamps through optional challenges to customize your leaderboard avatar.  

Maze-Generator 3000

Each maze is dynamically generated by the Maze-Generator 3000(affectionately referred to as the Mazer) with increasing complexity for and randomly placed power-ups to level up your scores, and help you survive longer. 

Fun with Friends!

You can gather as many as nine friends and take turns against the same set of mazes for competitive play. Compare scores or compare high scores with the local leaderboard which tracks up to ten players in the same game. Plus, enable online leaderboards to post your scores to monthly or all-time leaderboards.

Stamps

Increase the challenge of each run by taking on optional challenges and unlocking player stamps to customize your leaderboard avatar and show off your skills.
